asset_name: Academy Duel Hall — full battle backdrop
shared_properties: Uses the project core palette copy #D4AF37/#2B1B17/#00FFFF.
Maintains a fixed 16:9 duel composition for the full 1920x1080 combat camera.
Leaves clean character slots at x=360..480 and x=1440..1560 for duel readability.
differences: This file carries the full academy hall shell without projectiles or overlay widgets.
Floor rune ring and pillar rhythm create depth with no scrolling layers.

reference_images.label: duel_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Ground hall lighting, panel spacing, and arena depth.

reference_images.label: source_gdd
reference_images.purpose: Ground the 1920x1080 battle layout and duel slot placement.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/reflect_academy/trial_5/world_academy_duel_hall_1920x1080.png with AssetServer during Loading state and store the handle under world_academy_duel_hall_1920x1080.
runtime_notes: Spawn this sprite at z=0 before any combatant or projectile entity.
Keep the duel floor ring centered at x=960 y=760 in world space.
Use one opaque texture so pillar shadows and floor band remain aligned during screen shake.

context.usage: Base arena shell shown during every duel state from round start through defeat or victory.

composition: Floor rune ring outer diameter is 820 px and centered at x=960 y=760.
Left and right pillar stacks start at x=140 and x=1580 with 160 px width each.
Upper wall banner band occupies y=90..250 with three gold-trim arch windows.
Player slot footprint stays clear inside x=300..520 y=620..900 and enemy slot footprint stays clear inside x=1400..1620 y=220..500.

shape.silhouette: Wide academy hall with arched pillars, a rune-ring floor, and a dark maroon rear wall framed by gold trim.

acceptance_criteria: Canvas is exactly 1920x1080 px and fills the full camera frame with no transparent gaps.
Player and enemy slot footprints remain unobstructed inside the documented coordinate ranges.
Gold trim uses #D4AF37 and wall base uses #2B1B17 with no gradients outside the listed palette.
